response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; their resume shows senior leadership and complex system design far beyond the scope of this position, with no clear evidence of recent React/Nest.js or PostgreSQL work critical to the job, and their German language skill is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack experience across multiple frameworks
Proven ability to build scalable systems and integrate diverse data sources
Active open-source contributions and technical teaching experience
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; likely to be dissatisfied or leave quickly
Lacks demonstrable recent experience with required stack (React, Nest.js, PostgreSQL)
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
